## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Experiment / manifest
- [ ] Automation (scripts, CI)
- [ ] Other

## Test plan

- [ ] `make doctor`
- [ ] `make validate-manifests` (if YAML/Helm changed)
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` (if Python changed)
- [ ] `make quickstart` or manual steps described below

## DCO

- [ ] I certify the [DCO](DCO.md) (`git commit -s`; example: `Signed-off-by: Olúmáyòwá Akinkuehinmi <akintunero101@gmail.com>`)

## Notes

Breaking changes, follow-ups, or issue links.
